column3: answerOptions
“I was also planning to go! Maybe I’ll see you there.”
“Right, windy conditions can make a difference.”
“Ah, yeah, with that wind I wouldn’t find the beach pleasant either.”
“Perfect, fresh snow sounds great to me too —see you there!”
“True, it’s meant to snow that day, I forgot about that!”
“Ah, I’m no fan of snow either - maybe we’ll wait for it to melt first!”
“Nice, I’ve always wanted to try a marathon as well!”
“Oh wow, that’s a big event. Maybe I’ll come by and watch!”
“Ah, a full marathon? Yeah, that’s probably too difficult for me as well.”
“Well, I hope the rehearsal goes well! Sad that fans like me can’t be there too.”
“Right, I forgot it’s just the band soundcheck that day.”
“Ah, if it’s band-only that day, then I guess I won’t be there on Friday either.”
“Well, I’m not a professional like you, but I might come to watch you play!”
“Wow, that’s a really long match.”
“Ah, six hours is too long for me too —maybe another match then.”
“Sounds lovely, I’ll come hear the quartet too!”
“Oh, I didn’t realise it was a string quartet.”
“Ah, string quartets aren’t really for me either.”
“Nice, I’ve been meaning to read the book too!”
“Oh wow, that’s quite a long book.”
“Ah, 600 pages? Yeah, I think that’s too long for me as well.”
“Perfect for you then! I’ve been meaning to check it out as well.”
“Well, if you don’t think they are too expensive, I’d love to go there together sometime!”
“Ah, if it’s all expensive paintings, it’s not for me either then.”
“Nice, early classes like that are great—I’d go regularly too!”
“Oh, I see—it’s an early class.”
“Ah, yeah, 7am is way too early for me—I definitely wouldn’t go either.”
“Nice, I love spicy food as well—I’d definitely want to try it!”
“Right, I forgot that it's meant to be really spicy.”
“Ah, super spicy food? Yeah, that would definitely put me off too.”
“That’s so cool! I would love to cook with my own veggies too.”
“Wow, that's impressive!”
“I don’t think I would ever trust my own gardening skills enough to eat my own vegetables.”
“Well, I would love to buy a pastry from you at some point!”
“Oh, do your friends and family have to pay for them?”
“They’re lucky to get them for free, then!”
“I love landscapes, they’re my favourite paintings to have in my house!”
“Oh cool, landscapes can be very peaceful.”
“I think I prefer portraits, but landscapes are cool too.”
“Well, maybe one day they will start paying you for it!”
“That’s great — it’s nice to keep it just for fun.”
“Oh, you should start charging for it if you’re serious about it!”
“That’s really impressive, I’d love to build my own programs.”
“Really? What were the apps for?”
“Wow! I can’t code at all, unfortunately.”
“That’s amazing — performing on stage must be so exciting.”
“Cool, I’ve never seen a tap dance performance!”
“I don’t think I’d ever feel comfortable performing in front of people.”
“That’s nice — I like the idea of just catching and releasing them.”
“Very animal friendly!”
“I think I’d rather keep them and cook them.”
“Wow, it must be nice to wear something you made yourself.”
“That's impressive!”
“I don't think I could ever make a sweater good enough to wear.”
“I prefer driving as well!”
“I honestly enjoy both train and car rides a lot.”
“I’d much rather take the train than drive myself.”
